name: Nu-Med Plus, Inc.
business: Nu-Med Plus, Inc. is a medical device company focused on developing nitric oxide delivery systems. It has not commercialized any product yet. Development has been suspended pending additional capital.

exposures.sentence: NU-MED was organized as a medical device company principally engaged in the design, innovation, development, enhancement and commercialization of beginning, early, and selective later-stage quality medical devices.
